text_qpc_hafs: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُواْ سَاحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونٌ ٥٢
text_uthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ

translations.text: Every previous people to whom a messenger was sent also said, ‘A sor-cerer, or maybe a madman!’

text_qpc_hafs: أَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِهِۦۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٞ طَاغُونَ ٥٣
text_uthmani: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ

translation.text: Have they transmitted it to them
Have they transmitted it to them

translations.text: Did they tell one another to do this? No! They are a people who exceed all bounds,
so ignore them [Prophet]- you are not to blame-
and go on reminding [people], it is good for those who believe to be reminded.

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَا خَلَقۡتُ ٱلۡجِنَّ وَٱلۡإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُونِ ٥٦
text_uthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ

translations.text: I created jinn and mankind only to worship Me:

text_qpc_hafs: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنۡهُم مِّن رِّزۡقٖ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطۡعِمُونِ ٥٧
text_uthmani: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ

translations.text: I want no provision from them, nor do I want them to feed Me-

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلۡقُوَّةِ ٱلۡمَتِينُ ٥٨
text_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ

translations.text: God is the Provider, the Lord of Power, the Ever Mighty.

text_qpc_hafs: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ ذَنُوبٗا مِّثۡلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصۡحَٰبِهِمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونِ ٥٩
text_uthmani: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ

translation.text: so let them not ask Me to hasten
so let them not ask Me to hasten

translations.text: The evildoers, like their predecessors, will have a share of punishment- they need not ask Me to hasten it-

text_qpc_hafs: فَوَيۡلٞ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن يَوۡمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ ٦٠
text_uthmani: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ

translations.text: and woe betide those who deny the truth on the Day they have been promised.
By the mountain,
by a Scripture inscribed
in unrolled parch-ment,
by the much-visited House,
by the raised canopy,
by the ocean ever filled,
[Prophet], your Lord’s punishment is coming––
it cannot be put off––
on the Day when the sky sways back and forth
and the mountains float away.
Woe on that Day to those who deny the Truth,
who amuse themselves with idle chatter:

text_qpc_hafs: ي��وۡمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا ١٣
text_uthmani: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا

translations.text: on that Day they will be thrust into the Fire of Hell.

text_qpc_hafs: هَٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ ١٤
text_uthmani: هَـٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ

translations.text: ‘This is the Fire you used to deny.
